channel.title: htb on m1thryn.github.io
channel.description: Recent content in htb on m1thryn.github.io

item.title: Hack The Box :: Cronos
item.description: TL;DR: A good box. Not too hard, requires thinking, good training. Enumeration Starting with an nmap scan… Nmap Nmap full scan # Nmap 7.91 scan initiated Wed Jan 6 23:45:54 2021 as: nmap -vv --reason -Pn -A --osscan-guess --version-all -p- -oN /results/scans/nmap/full_tcp_nmap.txt -oX /results/scans/xml/full_tcp_nmap.xml 10.10.10.13 Nmap scan report for 10.10.10.13 Host is up, received user-set (0.14s latency). Scanned at 2021-01-06 23:45:54 UTC for 240s Not shown: 65532 filtered ports Reason: 65532 no-responses PORT STATE SERVICE REASON VERSION 22/tcp open ssh syn-ack ttl 62 OpenSSH 7.

item.title: Hack The Box :: Shocker
Hack The Box :: Legacy
Hack The Box :: Buff
Hack The Box :: Lame
